layout: default
title: "Jharkhand Daily News Brief: June 26, 2026"
date: 2026-06-26T04:52:18.002028+00:00
summary: "Fatal road accidents in Ramgarh, weather alerts, JSSC recruitment notifications, and local administrative camps in Dumka"
run_time_ist: "10:22AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Dumka Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:22AM</p>

<h2 class="section-title">Dumka and Nearby</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Driving License Camp:</strong> A special camp for driving license applications will be organized in Jarmundi on July 1 and 2.</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="section-title">Jharkhand</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Ramgarh Road Tragedy:</strong> A collision between a truck and a passenger vehicle in Ramgarh resulted in 7 to 8 deaths and multiple injuries, with reports indicating the victims were members of a band troupe and that locals have blocked the National Highway.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxNOVpZcEppVjEtRnljSkRia1M3U3NzQmdqRERRVTVFOHk4M242dThoS2Ezb1NYYUd3YnRKWl90WTEwSXd0UmYzTi0wWmZMN0pUSWRXV3BFcDRsenZHUGRiUUhtVThOVmszOWFSSXc4eUN1ZnI0X3J6QlNkSmVJV2VvOFQ1Y1VmU0wyZTllZ3pCYk0taENQZlVnWmtIaXcwRjlMUEZ6U1J0VlI5T2FDblNqdlhGd2pIemZ2R29Z?oc=5">J7</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxNcFk3V2lYNkJMS3FGbWlZaXZUWnBrdmpOV2JYVE1meDdsU25aeG45dFg5OTRUcHhQZGxmTUFqTEJYWUNhSVk5aE15NGVnejFNS2tna3ljajhWMHlyVU11TU85UmpZekRpQW1VSTdUMFhYM081ZXBCSlVrNkpka09mQ3ROY25yc0xPYmZUWkE0VFNYeGlydEdoSXlyVzZwQQ?oc=5">J8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J11</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxNXzJmWHU2M2JONGlpdzdCbkYtWExsR0ZDMHMzbUdDQUNmYlJFRFhZMEhudlE3VEV5TXNZakwtNnV0S0tLTjFNWENDTVoxNnRVRHdsX2NiZkxhdUVvUzJ0OGVCM3RYOWNFSmdJcUxEOGNzYjBid0F5NmpqcjZHRl8wVUR0TGkyVUoyd0pFcjhJRkJIdjhQWjF1bk1oeXEtdXhRZEUyMzN6RFFlR2lXQmRoT01qdWlRMWZw0gG-AUFVX3lxTE9rbzJkNUZaMEQ0TjBqZk9rc0R3SXFMVGFqbWpzNTdjTHRwQjhuVzBrcm12Mllwb3c5b1RseWJ0RU50SVVRZGt2UlhYQUxoTEhGZmtkSmJPTFAyNUl6bDBrTGJDakZsb1p1aS15YXhJZkV4ZEpuTUdYTnRxbGtlT1VnZkwteEVoSUhJV3VNSkZSUGM5Nzg1eWRJRlJQc0pLQXhaQl9RdS0wRy1oWHJNZklKYzlhTzlEY2RjLWhzV3c?oc=5">J12</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J13</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Weather Alert:</strong> The state is under an orange alert for June 26-27, with risks of thunderstorms and lightning expected to persist until July 1.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J14</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>JSSC Recruitment:</strong> The notification for the JSSC Inter-Level Recruitment 2026 has been released, with the application process scheduled to begin on July 20.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J15</a></span></li>
</ul>
